channel.title: Ml on TDJ28
channel.description: Recent content in Ml on TDJ28

item.title: Wiggle while you work: using jittering to augment object tracking in low fps videos
item.description: Dealing with low fps video can make re-identification of individuals between frames more difficult as the potential targets tend to “jump” between frames in a way that throws off trackers. Here, I show how applying a Gaussian jitter or wiggle to artificially increase the fps of the video can improve tracking.
